steps.title: Identify the relationship between ideas
steps.content: The first sentence states that many butterfly species have bold, brightly colored wings. The second sentence introduces species with almost completely colorless and transparent wings. The two ideas are directly opposed—bright and visible versus invisible and colorless.

steps.title: Match the relationship to the transition
steps.content:
However signals contrast or an unexpected turn, which perfectly fits the opposing relationship between the two butterfly types. The other three choices express similarity, prior timing, or restatement rather than contrast.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
